data.title: Anime Douyou
data.title_japanese: アニメどうよう全集
data.synopsis: A series of animated videos for various children's songs.
data.background: Anime Douyou was created in the late 1980s. A complete collection of the series was released on 5 DVD volumes in 2006. Each DVD contains approximately 30 minutes worth of content.

titles.title: スカーレッドライダーゼクス

data.title: Scared Rider Xechs
data.title_japanese: スカーレッドライダーゼクス
data.synopsis:
The Blue World, which symbolizes reason, is under constant attack by the creatures called the Nightfly O'Note originating from the Red World, symbolizing instinct. Akira Asagi, the 17-year-old protagonist who is a researcher at Blue World, is nominated to lead the war at Ryuukyuu LAG, a proud defense facility on the islands of Ishigaki and Iriomote. She meets the sixth combat unit "IS," which was formed four years after a fierce battle that annihilated the fifth unit. Akari must lead these six riders, also called the Scared Rider Xechs, to fight against the other world while at the same time deepening the relationship among them.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Tokyogurashi!
data.title_japanese: 凍京ぐらし！
data.synopsis: A parody opening for a spin-off of Gakkougurashi!, starring the characters from the visual novel Tokyo Necro by Nitro+.
data.background: The animation was released by Nitro+ as an April Fool's prank, complete with an official website announcing a full TV series. The website was closed shortly after.

titles.title: Naze Ikiru: Rennyo Shounin to Yoshizaki Enjou
なぜ生きる─蓮如上人と吉崎炎上─

data.title: Naze Ikiru: Rennyo Shounin to Yoshizaki Enjou
data.title_japanese: なぜ生きる─蓮如上人と吉崎炎上─
data.synopsis: Ryouken, a young man who hates temples and monks, laments his misfortunes but finds hope in his soon-to-be-born child. An unfortunate accident took everything from Ryouken. In the days of self-abandonment and suffering in darkness, Ryouken finds the teachings of the high priest Rennyo. In it, he finds answers to the question "Why live" as explained by the sage Shinran. As he is drawn into the teachings and no longer hesitates, Ryouken becomes Rennyo's apprentice. The number of worshippers increase, but the Honganji temple becomes a target of the other sects, forcing Ryouken and Rennyo to flee from Kyoto. In order to find a new place to teach, they arrive in Yoshizaki (now in Fukui Prefecture) in the Hokuriku region.

titles.title: Re:ゼロから始める休憩時間〈ブレイクタイム〉

data.title: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Break Time
data.title_japanese: Re:ゼロから始める休憩時間〈ブレイクタイム〉
data.synopsis:
Subaru Natsuki's sudden arrival in another world brought nothing short of tension and despair—but that does not mean there is no time for a break! The Kingdom of Lugunica is home to an array of interesting tales and lively characters, all waiting to be discovered. As Subaru explores this fantasy world, he learns that it may not be so different from his own.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Break Time was included with the Blu-ray and DVD release of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu by Funimation Entertainment on June 19, 2018.

data.title: Jiok
data.title_japanese: 지옥 두개 의 삶
data.synopsis:
Sometimes shortly before a person dies, an angel appears before them to inform them of their imminent death, as well as whether they are bound for Heaven or Hell. A man and a woman, one bound for Heaven and the other for Hell, each receive a visit. Knowing that their time in this realm is soon over, they each have a choice: accept their fate, or attempt to escape it and live on, even though the sin of running away carries a great price.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Meitantei Conan: Nazo no Suisei Kaijuu wo Oe!
名探偵コナン 謎のすい星怪獣を追え!
Detective Conan: Chase the Mysterious Comet Monster!

data.title: Meitantei Conan: Nazo no Suisei Kaijuu wo Oe!
data.title_english: Detective Conan: Chase the Mysterious Comet Monster!
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン 謎のすい星怪獣を追え!
data.synopsis: A short story about Conan and the Detective Boys.
data.background: The OVA predominantly features animated characters on live-action backgrounds.

titles.title: Meitantei Conan: Jomon Taiken Yatte Miyou!
名探偵コナン 縄文体験やってみよう!
Detective Conan: Let's Experience the Jomon Period!

data.title: Meitantei Conan: Jomon Taiken Yatte Miyou!
data.title_english: Detective Conan: Let's Experience the Jomon Period!
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン 縄文体験やってみよう!
data.synopsis: An educational Meitantei Conan OVA where the Shounen Tantei-dan (Detective Boys/The Junior Detective League) go on a field trip with Ran to learn about the Jomon Period of Japan, which is the earliest historical era of Japan. This OVA was released as a bundle with Shogakukan's Nijuuisseiki Kodomo Hyakka Rekishi-kan (21st Century Children's Encyclopedia History Museum). It uses animated characters on top of live-action backgrounds.

titles.title: Meitantei Conan: Internet Nazo no Mail Jiken
名探偵コナン インターネット謎のメール事件
Detective Conan: The Internet - The Mysterious E-mail Case

data.title: Meitantei Conan: Internet Nazo no Mail Jiken
data.title_english: Detective Conan: The Internet - The Mysterious E-mail Case
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン インターネット謎のメール事件
data.synopsis: An educational Meitantei Conan OVA where the Shounen Tantei-dan (Detective Boys/The Junior Detective League) have to do a school research project in the library when they receive a mysterious email that leads them on an educational scavenger hunt. This OVA was released as a bundle with Shogakukan's Nijuuisseiki Kodomo Hyakka Kagaku-kan Dai 2-ban (WOW!) (21st Century Children's Encyclopedia Science Museum 2nd Edition (WOW!)). It uses animated characters on top of live-action backgrounds.
